title: Campus Active Directory - Moving a Newly Joined Machine to Your Organizational Unit
body: The temporary location for newly-joined machines are: ou=computers,ou=orgUnits,dc=ad,dc=wisc,dc=edu (Production) ou=computers,ou=orgUnits,dc=qa,dc=ad,dc=wisc,dc=edu (QA) ou=computers,ou=orgUnits,dc=ite,dc=ad,dc=wisc,dc=edu (ITE) The Active Directory Users and Computers management tool should be used to move the machine. See Active Directory - Remote Administration Tools See Also Active Directory - Remote Administration Tools
